issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling for data loading and processing, leaving edge cases unaddressed.
The skill assumes a Python environment with specific libraries, limiting compatibility with non-Python agents.

scenarios.name: Weekly engineering status report from raw notes
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote free-form prose with no template structure; treatment hit every section of the skill's template — Summary, Completed, In Progress table, Blockers, Metrics table with This Week/Last Week/Trend, Next Week Plan — and surfaced the blocker honestly with the velocity drop quantified.

scenarios.name: Self-contained HTML sales report from CSV
scenarios.rationale: Baseline saved separate PNG files with no headless backend or embedding; treatment set matplotlib.use('Agg'), built the fig_to_base64 BytesIO helper, and rendered a single self-contained Jinja2 HTML with metric cards, embedded charts, and source/period metadata.
